TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Carl XVI Gustaf == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 4, Carl XVI Gustaf, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Sweden ta' misuw hya' ga Carl XVI Gustaf, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1973 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Carl XVI Gustaf htagan beh sa Solna, Stockholm. Carl XVI Gustaf maki tay kawas 1976 msqun ki Crown Princess Victoria, tehuk misuw qani. Crown Princess Victoria ga, kneril ni Carl XVI Gustaf. maki cyugal laqi nha. Victoria Ingrid Alice Désirée laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1977 kawas 7 byacing 14 ryax. Carl Philip Edmund Bertil laqi mlikuy htgan na ryax 1979 kawas 5 byacing 13 ryax. Madeleine Thérèse Amelie Josephine laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1989 kawas 6 byacing 10 ryax. 1966 kawas tmasoq gocyu pqwasan biru. mqbaq biru tmasoq biru gocyu lga wal sazing kawas 6 byacing mhetay. Carl XVI Gustaf Uppsala universitet ru Stockholms universitet mqwas biru. musa mosay cingay na qalang ru sakang' sinqqas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕwe*en taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕolna, s~ɕtoʦ~ʨkħolm. ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ʦ~ʨrown prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ *iʦ~ʨtoria, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. ʦ~ʨrown prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ *iʦ~ʨtoria ɣa, kneril ni ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta*. maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nħa. *iʦ~ʨtoria iŋri* aliʦ~ʨe **s~ɕir*e laqi kneril ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. ʦ~ʨarl pħilip e*mun* βertil laqi mlikuj ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. ma*eleine tħ*r*s~ɕe amelie *os~ɕepħine laqi kneril ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru. mqβaq βiru tmas~ɕoq βiru ɣoʦ~ʨju lɣa wal s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mħetaj. ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* upps~ɕala uni*ers~ɕitet ru s~ɕtoʦ~ʨkħolms~ɕ uni*ers~ɕitet mqwas~ɕ βiru. mus~ɕa mos~ɕaj ʦ~ʨiŋaj na qalaŋ ru s~ɕakaŋʔ s~ɕinqqas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Carl XVI Gustaf == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 4, Carl XVI Gustaf, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Sweden ta' misuw hya' ga Carl XVI Gustaf, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1973 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Carl XVI Gustaf htagan beh sa Solna, Stockholm. Carl XVI Gustaf maki tay kawas 1976 msqun ki Crown Princess Victoria, tehuk misuw qani. Crown Princess Victoria ga, kneril ni Carl XVI Gustaf. maki cyugal laqi nha. Victoria Ingrid Alice Désirée laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1977 kawas 7 byacing 14 ryax. Carl Philip Edmund Bertil laqi mlikuy htgan na ryax 1979 kawas 5 byacing 13 ryax. Madeleine Thérèse Amelie Josephine laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1989 kawas 6 byacing 10 ryax. 1966 kawas tmasoq gocyu pqwasan biru. mqbaq biru tmasoq biru gocyu lga wal sazing kawas 6 byacing mhetay. Carl XVI Gustaf Uppsala universitet ru Stockholms universitet mqwas biru. musa mosay cingay na qalang ru sakang' sinqqas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕwe*en taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕolna, s~ɕtoʦ~ʨkħolm. ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ʦ~ʨrown prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ *iʦ~ʨtoria, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. ʦ~ʨrown prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ *iʦ~ʨtoria ɣa, kneril ni ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta*. maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nħa. *iʦ~ʨtoria iŋri* aliʦ~ʨe **s~ɕir*e laqi kneril ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. ʦ~ʨarl pħilip e*mun* βertil laqi mlikuj ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. ma*eleine tħ*r*s~ɕe amelie *os~ɕepħine laqi kneril ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru. mqβaq βiru tmas~ɕoq βiru ɣoʦ~ʨju lɣa wal s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mħetaj. ʦ~ʨarl x*i ɣus~ɕta* upps~ɕala uni*ers~ɕitet ru s~ɕtoʦ~ʨkħolms~ɕ uni*ers~ɕitet mqwas~ɕ βiru. mus~ɕa mos~ɕaj ʦ~ʨiŋaj na qalaŋ ru s~ɕakaŋʔ s~ɕinqqas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
